description.en: Stop by our booth, like us on fb, fill out a quick survey, and leave with our swags!
description.zh-TW: 到攤位加入FB社團+填寫1分鐘小問卷即可獲得時尚好禮哦！

description.en: Come to our booth for Mini Games! There will be suprises waiting for you~
description.zh-TW: 來趨勢的攤位上完成活動任務可以換取獎品和蓋章哦!

description.en: Come join us for the mini games, prizes are swag items!
description.zh-TW: 歡迎來我們的攤位玩小遊戲，贏了有swag可以拿哦！

description.en: Come join iCHEF for the mini game!
description.zh-TW: 我們的攤位有準備精彩任務哦!

description.en: Stop by our booth for a quick survey and pick up some swags!
description.zh-TW: 歡迎來我們攤位填寫問卷領取精美小禮物！

description.en: There will be some surprises at the booth !
description.zh-TW: 到攤位會有精彩任務哦!

您可以至各攤位與廠商互動，完成攤位主的小任務，同時持 App 提供您的 QR code 給個攤位主。
而在經過攤位主認證掃描後，即視為完成戳章集點，當您集完所有攤位的戳章後，就能參與「 抽獎活動 」來獲得 「 天瓏書局 」和「 RealPython」所贊助的精選書籍！而我們將在第一天下午四點和第二天中午會公佈獲獎人名單哦！（附註：抽獎資格：集滿四個章就可以抽獎了哦！若要獲得抽獎機會的話，需在第一天或是第二天集滿四個章哦！越早參加獲獎機率越大，而且得獎名單不會重複喔！）
description.en: Come interact with the sponsors at each booth to collect stamp to enter our free raffle. You can go home with selected books sponsored by "天瓏書局(Tenlong Bookstore)” and "RealPython". Visit the booth to complete small tasks and gathering stamps. (Notes: The rule is for each participant to collect 4 stamps in total. Do so by visiting each booth, complete tasks, and provide your QR code to the booth owner. After the booth owner scans your code, you will be regarded as completing the stamp collection. Winners will be announced at 4 pm on day 1 and at noon for day 2. The sooner you enter the list, the more chance you will win!)
